today.name: Wednesday: Bleeds Tour 2026
today.description: Wednesday and Gouge Away perform live at the historic Moore Theatre. Alternative/indie rock concert.

today.name: Moonchild with Brittney Carter
today.description: Moonchild brings their soulful R&B/jazz sound to The Crocodile with special guest Brittney Carter.

today.name: Josiah Queen Jervis Campbell
today.description: Christian music artist Josiah Queen performs at Showbox SoDo.

today.name: Jacques Greene
today.description: Electronic music producer Jacques Greene brings his house and techno beats to Substation.

today.name: Brew Review Fundraiser
today.description: $30 fundraiser for Unemployment Law Project offering beer, cider, wine, games, and music. Ticket includes food and two drinks. Free for children 12 and under.

today.name: Candlelight Concert: 1990s Music
today.description: String quartet playing familiar 90s songs for an hour in the warm glow of simulated candles.

today.name: Candlelight Concert: Adele
today.description: String quartet performing Adele's hits in an intimate candlelit setting.

today.name: Walden
today.description: A three-person drama about humanity's future. Live theater performance.

today.name: Pat Metheny
today.description: Legendary jazz guitarist Pat Metheny performs a multi-night engagement at Jazz Alley.

today.name: Seattle Restaurant Week
today.description: Special deals at 220+ restaurants across Seattle and Eastside.

this_weekend.name: FKA twigs: Body High Tour
this_weekend.description: Chameleonic artist FKA twigs brings her experimental pop and electronic sound to Seattle on her Body High Tour.

this_weekend.name: Pancakes & Booze Art Show
this_weekend.description: A traveling underground art exhibition featuring 70+ artists, free pancakes, DJ music, live body painting, and a bar. Age 21+.

this_weekend.name: HOMESHAKE
this_weekend.description: Indie pop/lo-fi artist HOMESHAKE (Peter Sagar) performs live at Barboza.

this_weekend.name: Ayybo
this_weekend.description: Electronic music artist Ayybo brings energetic dance beats to the Showbox.

this_weekend.name: Robin Hood
this_weekend.description: The hero Robin Hood fights for justice in this family-friendly theatrical production.

this_weekend.name: Carnival of Cocktails
this_weekend.description: The highlight of Seattle Cocktail Week! Watch cocktail demonstrations, shop at food trucks, and use 12 tokens to taste spirits or mini cocktails. $69, age 21+.

this_weekend.name: Candlelight Concert: Beatles
this_weekend.description: String quartet performing Beatles classics in a beautiful candlelit setting.

this_weekend.name: Candlelight Concert: Coldplay
this_weekend.description: String quartet playing Coldplay's greatest hits in an intimate atmosphere.

this_weekend.name: Seattle Symphony: Xian Conducts Daniil Trifonov
this_weekend.description: World-renowned pianist Daniil Trifonov performs with the Seattle Symphony under conductor Xian Zhang.

this_weekend.name: MOMIX: Alice
this_weekend.venue: Meany Center for the Performing Arts
this_weekend.description: The dance company MOMIX creates surreal and fantastic worlds with light, shadow, props and the human body in this Alice in Wonderland-inspired performance.

this_weekend.name: Professional Bull Riders: Unleash the Beast
this_weekend.description: Professional bull riders compete to see who can last the longest atop a bucking bull.

this_weekend.name: Emerald Cup
this_weekend.description: Bodybuilding, fitness, figure, bikini, and physique championship with health-industry vendors.

this_weekend.name: Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival
this_weekend.description: FREE festival celebrating Seattle's friendship with Japan. Enjoy Japanese art, dance, music, martial arts, and food.

this_weekend.name: Seattle Cherry Blossom Run
this_weekend.description: Run or walk under the cherry trees. Saturday features 5K & 10K, Sunday features half marathon.

this_weekend.name: Columbia City Night Market
this_weekend.description: Monthly night market with 8 food trucks, 20 makers and vendors, live music, and a beer garden. FREE admission.

this_weekend.name: International Children's Friendship Festival
this_weekend.description: FREE festival where children from around the world dance, sing, play music, make origami, and get faces painted.

this_weekend.name: Pop Cats Convention
this_weekend.description: Cat convention celebrating cats and pop culture with artwork, adoptable cats, speakers, workshops, and vendors. You can even bring your own cat!

this_weekend.name: Seussical the Musical
this_weekend.description: Dr. Seuss characters come to life in this family-friendly musical for all ages.

this_weekend.name: Sweet Charity
this_weekend.description: High-energy 1960s musical set in New York about a dancer looking for love.

this_weekend.name: ABBA Night
this_weekend.description: DJ playing ABBA and Euro pop, followed by Seattle tribute band Abbagrahics performing live. Nordic food for sale. $72, age 21+.
